name: Oriental Shrimp Toast
recipeIngredient: 40 slices 1/4 inch thick, about 2-3 French baguettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop scallion and ginger in a food processor.
2. Add shrimp; process to a paste.
3. Remove mixture to a bowl. Add egg, sherry, soy sauce, sesame oil, and salt to the paste; combine well.
4. Top each slice of bread with 1 tablespoon of the mixture.
5. Press it down gently so that it doesn't come off when frying.
6. Heat wok on high heat. Add 2 cups of oil, heat oil to 350°F (175°C).
7. Deep-fry a few toasts at a time, filling side down, for 30 seconds or until golden brown.
8. Turn over and fry another 30 seconds, then remove and drain.
